texto: My education in the arts began at the Cleveland Museum of Art. As a Cleveland child, I visited the museum's halls and corridors, gallery spaces and shows, over and over. For me, the Cleveland Museum was a school of my very own - the place where my eyes opened, my tastes developed, my ideas about beauty and creativity grew.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Agnes Gund sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “My education in the arts began at the Cleveland Museum of Art. As a Cleveland child, I visited th…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, education, art, útil em momentos de art e creativity.

frase_original: My education in the arts began at the Cleveland Museum of Art. As a Cleveland child, I visited the museum's halls and corridors, gallery spaces and shows, over and over. For me, the Cleveland Museum was a school of my very own - the place where my eyes opened, my tastes developed, my ideas about beauty and creativity grew.

texto: I have the same sense of discovery and exhilaration from objects of design and everyday use - I am inspired by the buildings in my city, by park greenery and dazzling store windows, by the jaunty strollers and umbrellas and billboards I walk past. Just strolling our streets, we encounter creativity every single day.
explicacao: Citação de Agnes Gund sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “I have the same sense of discovery and exhilaration from objects of design and everyday use - I a…” articula motivacao, day, creativity em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e creativity.
